title: Lightmap Fixer
description: 1.21.9 changed the lightmap shader, and now block light is strangely warm/orange. this fixes that.
body:
all this pack does is put 25w33a's ```core/lightmap``` shader into a resource pack so that it works in later versions, fixing the strangely warm lighting.
I have no idea if this'll break anything visually. maybe the end flashes? they're why the shader was changed in the first place. I dunno.
